subcodes.first_line: O ancient friend and cherished spiritual companion! Think not that thou art forgotten for a moment or effaced from memory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار قدیم و دوست روحانی دیرین همچه کمان منما که آنی فراموش شدی و از خاطر محو
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @consolation and comfort, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @growth of the Cause
